input_text: Perempuan Cina memang suka menggoda lelaki Melayu. Diorang memang tak ada maruah, dah la pakai seksi. Patut la ramai jantan Melayu tergoda.
reason: Gendered communal attack stereotyping Chinese women as seductive and lacking morals. Dehumanizes women from a specific race while stoking inter-ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Kita tidak sepatutnya membuat generalisasi tentang mana-mana kaum berdasarkan cara berpakaian. Setiap individu berhak dihormati tanpa mengira bangsa.

input_text: Perempuan India tu memang pemalas, tak pandai masak, tak pandai jaga anak. Sebab tu la lelaki India semua cari Melayu.
reason: Gendered ethnic slur labelling Indian women as lazy and incompetent. Promotes harmful stereotypes based on race and gender.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu mempunyai kelebihan tersendiri. Tidak adil untuk menilai seseorang berdasarkan kaum atau jantina mereka.

input_text: Awek Melayu yang kahwin Cina ni memang dah buang agama. Malu bangsa, malu keluarga. Patut kena ajar.
reason: Condemns interracial marriage by linking it to abandonment of religion. Implied threat of punitive action against the individual.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur adalah hak peribadi. Di Malaysia, undang-undang melindungi hak setiap warganegara untuk memilih pasangan tanpa mengira kaum.

input_text: Jangan beli nasi lemak dari gerai India tu, saya dengar diorang guna minyak terpakai berkali-kali sampai hitam. Orang India memang tak kisah kebersihan.
reason: Spreads unverified food safety claims targeting ethnic Indian food vendors with racist generalization about hygiene.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang kebersihan makanan, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa kesihatan untuk siasatan. Jangan sasarkan kaum tertentu.

input_text: Kuota universiti ni memang tak adil. Budak Cina SPM 10A pun tak dapat masuk, tapi budak lain 5A boleh masuk. Diorang ni macam parasit makan hak orang lain.
reason: Uses dehumanizing language ('parasit') when discussing university quotas. Legitimate policy grievance turned into ethnic hostility through dehumanization.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kuota kemasukan universiti memang perlu dibincangkan secara telus. Semua pelajar berhak mendapat peluang berdasarkan merit tanpa mengira latar belakang.

input_text: Tengok la perempuan India ni, hitam legam pun nak post gambar kat Instagram. Rasa cantik ke? Memang tak sedar diri.
reason: Colourism and gendered racial abuse targeting Indian women's skin tone. Body-shaming based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang berhak berkongsi gambar mereka tanpa dihina. Kecantikan tidak ditentukan oleh warna kulit.

input_text: Jangan makan kuih dari kedai Cina masa Tahun Baru Cina. Kawan saya cakap diorang guna lemak babi dalam semua kuih. Share banyak-banyak!
reason: Fabricated halal scare about Chinese festive food without evidence. Weaponizes religious dietary concerns to spread fear and division.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada keraguan tentang status halal sesuatu makanan, semak sijil JAKIM atau tanya terus kepada penjual. Jangan sebarkan dakwaan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Siapa kenal couple ni? Melayu dengan Cina dating kat Mid Valley. Tolong share sampai family diorang tahu. Memalukan!
reason: Attempts to identify and publicly shame an interracial couple by calling for exposure to their families. Privacy violation combined with communal shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Hubungan peribadi adalah hak individu. Kita tidak sepatutnya menyebarkan gambar orang lain atau mendedahkan identiti mereka tanpa kebenaran.

input_text: Perempuan Melayu zaman sekarang dah rosak akhlak. Makan babi, minum arak, dating Cina. Kita kena selamatkan bangsa kita sebelum terlambat.
reason: Gendered moral policing of Malay women with religious and racial framing. Positions personal choices as threats to the entire race.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu mempunyai hak membuat pilihan peribadi. Kita perlu menghormati kebebasan orang lain tanpa menghakimi secara terbuka.

input_text: Makanan mamak memang tak bersih. Diorang guna tangan nak buat roti canai, tak basuh tangan pun. Sebab tu ramai orang sakit lepas makan mamak.
reason: Spreads unverified health claims specifically targeting mamak restaurants with ethnic undertones about hygiene.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang kebersihan restoran, laporkan kepada Jabatan Kesihatan. Elakkan membuat generalisasi terhadap mana-mana jenis kedai makan.

input_text: Budak India ni dapat masuk universiti pun sebab kuota. Otak takde, tempat pun nak rampas. Macam biawak hidup kat rumah orang.
reason: Dehumanizes Indian students as lizards living in others' homes. University quota resentment expressed through ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap pelajar yang diterima masuk ke universiti telah memenuhi syarat tertentu. Kita perlu membincangkan polisi pendidikan tanpa menghina mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Video ni viral — perempuan Melayu berpelukan dengan lelaki India kat taman. Sape kenal? Tolong tag family dia. Orang macam ni kena expose.
reason: Calls for doxxing of an interracial couple caught on video. Vigilante-style public shaming with potential real-world consequences.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan video peribadi orang lain tanpa kebenaran adalah salah dari segi undang-undang. Hormati privasi semua orang.

input_text: Perempuan Cina memang materialistik. Diorang kahwin pun sebab duit je. Tak macam Melayu yang kahwin sebab sayang.
reason: Gendered racial stereotype labelling Chinese women as materialistic. Promotes harmful communal comparison between ethnic groups.
suggested_rewrite: Motivasi perkahwinan berbeza bagi setiap individu dan tidak berkaitan dengan kaum. Elakkan membuat generalisasi yang boleh menyinggung perasaan orang lain.

input_text: Air kari kedai India tu guna air paip kotor. Member aku yang kerja situ cakap. Jangan makan kalau nak selamat.
reason: False food safety claim targeting Indian restaurants using unverifiable insider source. Ethnic profiling disguised as health concern.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada masalah kebersihan makanan, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa untuk siasatan rasmi. Jangan sebarkan dakwaan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Aku dah lama perasan — tempat universiti untuk budak Melayu makin sikit sebab diorang bagi kat kaum lain. Kita ni macam pengemis kat tanah sendiri.
reason: Frames university quota discourse as ethnic victimhood. Uses emotive language to polarize communities.
suggested_rewrite: Perbincangan tentang dasar pendidikan perlu berdasarkan fakta dan data. Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak mendapat pendidikan berkualiti.

input_text: Perempuan Tamil memang kuat bau, badan diorang peluh tak mandi. Tak hairan la diorang susah nak cari boyfriend.
reason: Deeply offensive gendered ethnic slur targeting Tamil women with body-shaming. Dehumanizing and degrading.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu layak dihormati tanpa mengira kaum. Komen berbaur perkauman dan body-shaming tidak sepatutnya disebarkan.

input_text: Kuih yang dijual kat pasar malam Cina tu ada racun tikus sikit-sikit. Orang kampung saya ramai dah sakit lepas makan. Boikot!
reason: Fabricated poisoning claim targeting Chinese food vendors. Dangerous misinformation that could incite boycotts and ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada syak makanan tercemar, buat laporan polis dan hubungi Jabatan Kesihatan. Jangan sebarkan tuduhan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Couple Melayu-India ni memang tak sedar diri. Upload gambar kat TikTok macam bangga. Siapa ada info diorang, DM aku.
reason: Seeks personal information of an interracial couple to shame them. Privacy violation and communal targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Pasangan dari pelbagai latar belakang kaum adalah perkara biasa di Malaysia. Hormati privasi dan pilihan peribadi orang lain.

input_text: Budak perempuan Cina memang senang nak tackle. Belanja sikit je, diorang ikut. Lelaki Melayu kena ambil kesempatan ni.
reason: Sexualizes Chinese women as easy targets and encourages exploitation. Gendered racial objectification.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap wanita berhak dihormati tanpa mengira kaum. Jangan jadikan perbezaan budaya sebagai alasan untuk mengeksploitasi sesiapa.

input_text: Doktor India kat klinik tu memang tak reti buat kerja. Bagi ubat salah sampai orang mati. Jangan pergi klinik dia, bahaya nyawa korang.
reason: Unverified medical malpractice claim targeting a doctor by ethnicity. Dangerous misinformation that could undermine trust in healthcare professionals.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada aduan tentang malpraktik perubatan, laporkan kepada Majlis Perubatan Malaysia. Jangan kaitkan isu profesional dengan kaum.

input_text: Aku rasa budak Melayu makin susah nak masuk universiti sebab tempat kita kena rampas. Binatang-binatang ni memang tak tahu bersyukur.
reason: Dehumanizes other ethnic groups as 'binatang' in the context of university quota resentment. Extreme inflammatory polarization.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar pendidikan perlu dikaji secara adil. Perbincangan tentang kuota perlu dilakukan dengan hormat tanpa menyerang mana-mana kumpulan.

input_text: Perempuan India yang pakai saree kat pejabat tu memang nak tarik perhatian je. Tak sesuai la dengan budaya Malaysia. Balik India la pakai macam tu.
reason: Attacks Indian women for wearing traditional clothing as inappropriate. Tells them to 'go back to India' — classic xenophobic trope.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia adalah negara pelbagai budaya. Pakaian tradisional setiap kaum adalah sebahagian daripada identiti Malaysia dan patut dihormati.

input_text: Nasi kandar tu guna daging yang dah expired. Owner India memang kedekut, diorang sanggup buat apa saja untuk jimat kos. Jangan makan sana!
reason: Fabricated food safety allegation targeting Indian restaurant owners with ethnic stereotypes about being stingy.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada isu keselamatan makanan, buat aduan rasmi kepada pihak berkuasa. Elakkan mengaitkan masalah perniagaan dengan kaum pemilik.

input_text: Gadis Melayu ni buat malu je. Post gambar dating dengan boyfriend China kat Twitter. Sape tahu nama penuh dia? Nak report kat majikan dia.
reason: Seeks personal information to report an interracial relationship to the woman's employer. Doxxing attempt combined with gendered moral policing.
suggested_rewrite: Hubungan peribadi seseorang bukan urusan orang lain. Mencari maklumat peribadi untuk tujuan menghukum seseorang adalah salah dan melanggar privasi.

input_text: Perempuan Melayu yang kahwin non-Muslim memang layak dibuang. Biar hidup susah, padan muka. Anak-anak pun nanti jadi haru-biru.
reason: Gendered religious condemnation wishing suffering upon women who marry outside the faith. Hostile and punitive language.
suggested_rewrite: Isu perkahwinan campur agama memerlukan pendekatan berhikmah. Kita perlu berbincang dengan hormat tanpa mendoakan keburukan kepada sesiapa.

input_text: Tau tak, gerai mi sup kat Jalan TAR tu guna daging anjing. Owner dia Cina, memang biasa la diorang makan anjing. Share cepat sebelum kena delete!
reason: Fabricated claim about dog meat in Chinese food stalls. Dangerous health misinformation tied to racist stereotypes about Chinese dietary habits.
suggested_rewrite: Semua premis makanan di Malaysia tertakluk kepada pemeriksaan pihak berkuasa. Jangan sebarkan fitnah tanpa bukti yang boleh merosakkan reputasi peniaga.

input_text: Budak universiti Melayu makin susah nak dapat biasiswa. Semua dah kena sapu dengan kaum lain. Diorang ni macam lintah, hisap darah kita je.
reason: Dehumanizes non-Malay students as 'lintah' (leeches) in the context of scholarship allocation. Incites ethnic resentment through dehumanizing rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Isu biasiswa perlu ditangani melalui dasar yang telus dan adil. Semua pelajar yang layak berhak dipertimbangkan tanpa mengira latar belakang.

input_text: Aku dengar dari jiran, perempuan Cina suka santet suami Melayu supaya kahwin dengan diorang. Sebab tu la ramai lelaki Melayu tergoda.
reason: Superstitious misinformation accusing Chinese women of using black magic to seduce Malay men. Gendered communal attack based on unfounded claims.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan kepercayaan karut tentang mana-mana kaum adalah tidak bertanggungjawab. Perkahwinan campur berlaku atas pilihan peribadi kedua-dua pihak.

input_text: Perempuan India yang kerja kat office memang suka mengadu domba. Fitrah diorang memang macam tu, suka gaduh. Jangan percaya diorang.
reason: Workplace gendered racial slur claiming Indian women are inherently manipulative. Promotes discrimination in professional settings.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu berbeza tanpa mengira kaum. Masalah di tempat kerja perlu diselesaikan secara profesional tanpa membuat generalisasi berasaskan bangsa.

input_text: Kuota masuk universiti ni memang direka untuk halang orang Cina berjaya. Sistem ni nak buat kita jadi hamba selamanya. Bangkit lawan!
reason: Frames university quota as deliberate ethnic persecution and calls for uprising. Transforms policy critique into incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar pendidikan perlu diperbaiki melalui perbincangan dan proses demokratik. Semua rakyat boleh menyuarakan pandangan melalui saluran yang sah.

input_text: Couple Melayu-Cina ni dah viral satu kampung. Sape tau alamat rumah diorang? Jom pergi bagi nasihat sikit.
reason: Seeks home address of interracial couple with euphemistic threat of confrontation. Doxxing and vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: Mencari alamat rumah orang lain untuk tujuan konfrontasi adalah jenayah. Hormati privasi dan hak setiap individu.

input_text: Perempuan Melayu yang pakai tudung tapi dating India ni hipokrit. Kena dedahkan kat media sosial biar semua orang tahu.
reason: Targets hijab-wearing Malay women in interracial relationships for public shaming. Combines religious policing with privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Kehidupan peribadi seseorang bukan urusan orang ramai. Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi orang lain untuk menghukum mereka adalah salah.

input_text: Teh tarik kat kedai mamak tu guna susu expired. Owner India memang tak kisah pasal kesihatan pelanggan. Boikot mamak!
reason: Unverified expired milk allegation targeting mamak restaurants with ethnic profiling. Incites boycott based on fabricated health claims.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda syak ada masalah kebersihan di restoran, buat aduan rasmi kepada Jabatan Kesihatan. Jangan sebarkan dakwaan yang belum disahkan.

input_text: Perempuan Cina kat kampus memang arrogant, ingat diorang cantik sangat. Padahal muka rata macam pinggan. Tak layak masuk universiti pun.
reason: Gendered racial body-shaming of Chinese women in university settings. Combines appearance-based abuse with questioning their academic merit.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap pelajar yang diterima masuk ke universiti telah memenuhi syarat akademik. Tidak adil untuk menghina penampilan atau keupayaan seseorang berdasarkan kaum.

input_text: Apasal la perempuan Melayu ni sanggup kahwin Cina? Dah jual maruah bangsa. Kita kena senarai hitam diorang semua dan viralkan gambar diorang.
reason: Calls for creating a blacklist and viralizing photos of Malay women who marry Chinese men. Gendered communal attack with organized doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur adalah hak peribadi yang dilindungi undang-undang. Membuat senarai hitam dan menyebarkan gambar peribadi orang lain adalah salah dan berpotensi menjadi jenayah.

input_text: Chinese women in Malaysia are all the same — gold diggers who only care about money. That's why so many marriages with them end in divorce.
reason: Gendered ethnic stereotype labelling all Chinese women as gold diggers. Harmful generalization that promotes communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Relationship dynamics vary across all individuals regardless of ethnicity. It is unfair to stereotype an entire community based on gender and race.

input_text: Don't eat at Indian restaurants in KL. My friend found a cockroach in his biryani and got food poisoning. Indian food is always dirty lah.
reason: Uses an isolated anecdote to generalize all Indian food as dirty. Dangerous misinformation combined with ethnic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: If you have a bad dining experience, report it to the health authorities. Food hygiene issues can occur at any restaurant regardless of the owner's ethnicity.

input_text: Malay women who date Chinese guys are a disgrace to their race. Someone needs to teach them a lesson. Share their photos so everyone knows.
reason: Calls for public shaming and implied threats against Malay women in interracial relationships. Combination of communal hostility and doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Interracial relationships are personal choices protected by law. No one should be threatened or shamed for choosing who they love.

input_text: Indian women from estates are so uneducated and uncouth. They don't belong in proper society. Should just stay in the kampung where they came from.
reason: Class-based and gendered ethnic attack on Indian women from plantation backgrounds. Dehumanizes and excludes them from mainstream society.
suggested_rewrite: Every Malaysian deserves respect and access to opportunities regardless of their background. Socioeconomic challenges should be addressed through inclusive policies, not discrimination.

input_text: University spots should go to deserving Malays, not these pendatang kids who steal our places. They're like rats eating from our table.
reason: Dehumanizes non-Malay students as rats and uses pendatang rhetoric in university quota debate. Extreme inflammatory polarization.
suggested_rewrite: University admissions should be fair and transparent. All Malaysian citizens have the right to higher education, and policy debates should be conducted respectfully.

input_text: Chinese food stalls add illegal chemicals to make their food addictive. That's why everyone keeps going back. It's slow poisoning the Malay community!
reason: Conspiracy theory about Chinese food stalls deliberately poisoning Malays. Dangerous health misinformation weaponized for ethnic division.
suggested_rewrite: Food safety is regulated by BKKM and JAKIM. If you have concerns about food additives, check with the authorities rather than spreading unverified claims.

input_text: Does anyone know this Malay girl dating the Indian guy in Penang? She works at a bank. Her family needs to know about this shameful behaviour.
reason: Seeks to identify and expose an interracial couple by sharing workplace details. Doxxing attempt driven by communal prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: People's personal relationships are their own business. Attempting to expose or identify individuals based on their dating choices is a violation of privacy.

input_text: Malay women these days have no shame. Going out with non-Muslim men, drinking alcohol. We need to publicly name and shame them before the whole ummah is corrupted.
reason: Calls for public naming and shaming of Malay women based on religious moral policing. Combines religious provocation with privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Religious guidance should be offered privately and compassionately, not through public shaming. Everyone has the right to privacy in their personal lives.

input_text: Tamil women are so loud and aggressive. No wonder they can't keep a husband. Even their own men prefer Malay or Chinese women.
reason: Gendered ethnic stereotyping of Tamil women as aggressive and undesirable. Promotes inter-ethnic comparison in a degrading manner.
suggested_rewrite: Personality traits are individual characteristics, not ethnic ones. It is harmful to generalize any community based on stereotypes.

input_text: The quota system means Indian students who barely pass get university places while Chinese students with straight As are rejected. These freeloaders are destroying our education system.
reason: Misrepresents university admissions to pit ethnic groups against each other. Labels Indian students as freeloaders — dehumanizing language in policy debate.
suggested_rewrite: University admissions policies deserve transparent public discussion. All students admitted have met requirements, and systemic reforms should be debated based on data, not ethnic blame.

input_text: Warning: Chinese medicine shops in Petaling Street are selling fake supplements that cause kidney failure. These people will do anything for money, don't trust them!
reason: Unsubstantiated health scare targeting Chinese medicine businesses. Generalizes an entire community as untrustworthy.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect any supplement is unsafe, report it to the Ministry of Health. Purchase only from licensed pharmacies and check for proper certification.

input_text: That interracial couple on TikTok — Malay girl with Chinese boyfriend — someone please find out where they live. Their parents deserve to know what kind of daughter they raised.
reason: Solicits personal address of an interracial couple for confrontation. Clear doxxing and vigilante intent.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing personal information to harass others is illegal in Malaysia. Respect people's privacy and personal choices.

input_text: Indian women who wear modern clothes are just asking for trouble. They should stick to their saris and stay home. No wonder harassment cases are so high among them.
reason: Victim-blaming rhetoric targeting Indian women's clothing choices. Combines gender-based harassment justification with ethnic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Every woman has the right to dress as she chooses without facing harassment. Blaming clothing choices for harassment is wrong regardless of ethnicity.

input_text: I heard mamak restaurants use recycled oil that's been used for weeks. The Indian owners don't care about your health, only profit. Spread the word!
reason: Unverified food safety claim targeting mamak restaurants with ethnic profiling of Indian owners. Calls for viral spread of misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Food safety concerns should be reported to BKKM for proper investigation. Avoid spreading unverified claims that target specific ethnic communities.

input_text: Chinese women who marry Malay men are just doing it for the bumiputera benefits. They have no real love, just business strategy. Classic pendatang mentality.
reason: Accuses Chinese women of strategic marriages for bumiputera advantages. Gendered communal attack combined with pendatang rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Interracial marriages are based on personal choices and love. Questioning people's motives based on their ethnicity is unfair and divisive.

input_text: Malay students deserve 100% of university places. Other races can go to private colleges. If they don't like it, they can leave the country. We were here first.
reason: Advocates complete ethnic exclusion from public universities. 'Leave the country' rhetoric delegitimizes non-Malay citizenship rights.
suggested_rewrite: Education policy should balance supporting disadvantaged communities while ensuring all citizens have fair access. Constructive dialogue is better than exclusionary rhetoric.

input_text: BREAKING: Nasi lemak sold near Masjid Jamek tested positive for pork DNA! Chinese vendor caught red-handed. Share before they delete this!
reason: Fabricated halal contamination claim targeting Chinese food vendors near a mosque. Combines fake health alert with religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Halal compliance is monitored by JAKIM. If you have genuine concerns about food certification, report them through official channels rather than spreading unverified claims.

input_text: Look at this couple — Malay girl holding hands with some Chinese guy at Pavilion. Who knows them? Tag their parents. This is what happens when we don't control our daughters.
reason: Gendered moral policing and doxxing attempt targeting an interracial couple. Frames women as property to be 'controlled'.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone has the right to choose their partner. Sharing personal photos and seeking to expose people's identities is a violation of privacy and potentially illegal.

input_text: Indian women working in corporate are only there because of diversity quotas. They can't compete on merit. Companies just need to tick the box.
reason: Dismisses Indian women's professional achievements as quota-filling. Gendered ethnic attack undermining their competence.
suggested_rewrite: All professionals earn their positions through qualifications and hard work. Diversity in the workplace benefits everyone and should not be used to diminish anyone's achievements.

input_text: My friend ate char kuey teow from a Chinese hawker and got hepatitis. Chinese stalls never wash their woks properly. Stay safe, avoid Chinese food!
reason: False hepatitis claim linked to Chinese food hawkers. Medically inaccurate misinformation used to target an ethnic community's food businesses.
suggested_rewrite: Hepatitis transmission is a medical issue that should be discussed with healthcare professionals. Food hygiene concerns should be reported to authorities, not used to target ethnic food vendors.

input_text: Spotted another Malay-Indian couple at Sunway. These people have no shame. If you recognize them, share their details. Society needs to know.
reason: Calls for identifying and exposing interracial couples. Doxxing attempt fueled by communal prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Interracial relationships are normal in a multicultural society like Malaysia. Attempting to publicly shame couples based on race is wrong and potentially illegal.

input_text: These non-Malay kids getting scholarships are cockroaches infesting our education system. Time to fumigate and take back what's ours.
reason: Extreme dehumanization comparing non-Malay students to cockroaches with implied call for removal. Borders on incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Scholarship policies should be reviewed through proper democratic channels. All Malaysian students deserve fair consideration based on need and merit.

input_text: Kesian tengok perempuan Melayu pakai hijab tapi dating non-Muslim. 真是丢人现眼. Someone needs to report her to the religious authorities. I have her photo.
reason: Plans to report a hijab-wearing woman to religious authorities for her relationship choice. Religious moral policing combined with privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Religious matters are personal and should be handled with compassion. Sharing someone's photo or reporting them to authorities for their personal choices is wrong.

input_text: Indian aunties selling curry at pasar malam — my friend found a hair and nail inside. Typical Indian hygiene standards. Never again!
reason: Anecdotal food contamination claim generalized to indict Indian hygiene standards. Ethnic food targeting through unverified stories.
suggested_rewrite: Foreign objects in food can happen at any food stall. Report specific incidents to health authorities rather than blaming an entire ethnic community.

input_text: Women from the Indian community are always so dramatic and emotional. They can't handle any professional pressure. That's why you rarely see them in leadership positions.
reason: Gendered ethnic stereotype dismissing Indian women's professional capabilities. Attributes lack of representation to perceived emotional weakness.
suggested_rewrite: Representation gaps in leadership have complex structural causes. It is wrong to attribute them to stereotypes about any gender or ethnic group.

input_text: 华人女生嫁马来人就是为了拿bumiputera好处。她们根本没有自尊心，什么都是为了钱。
reason: Gendered ethnic attack accusing Chinese women of marrying Malay men purely for bumiputera benefits. Dehumanizes women's choices as purely financial.
suggested_rewrite: 跨族婚姻是个人选择，不应被简单地归结为经济动机。每个人的感情和决定都应该得到尊重。

input_text: 千万不要吃印度档口的食物！他们用的油都是回收的，已经变黑了还在用。印度人就是不讲卫生。转发让更多人知道！
reason: Fabricated food safety claim targeting Indian food vendors with racist hygiene generalization. Calls for viral sharing of misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对任何餐厅的卫生有疑虑，请向卫生部门投诉。不要用种族偏见来概括所有餐饮业者。

input_text: 大学名额都被马来人占光了，华人考得再好也没用。这些寄生虫占着我们的资源。太不公平了！
reason: Uses dehumanizing language (parasites) when discussing university quotas. Legitimate policy frustration expressed through ethnic hatred.
suggested_rewrite: 大学录取政策确实值得讨论。我们应该通过理性的对话和政策建议来推动公平的教育制度，而不是攻击任何族群。

input_text: 马来女生跟华人男生在一起？太丢人了！谁认识她？把她的名字和学校分享出来，让她的家人知道。
reason: Doxxing attempt targeting a Malay woman in an interracial relationship by seeking her personal details and school. Privacy violation with communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人都有选择伴侣的权利。分享他人的个人信息来羞辱他们是违法的，也是不道德的。

input_text: 印度女人又黑又丑，难怪印度男人都喜欢找马来女生。她们自己不照照镜子。
reason: Colourism and gendered racial attack mocking Indian women's appearance. Deeply offensive body-shaming based on ethnicity.

input_text: 听说华人中药店卖的药里面掺假了，吃了会中毒。华人商人就是黑心，只认钱不认人。大家千万不要买！

input_text: 马来女生穿着暴露跟印度男生约会的照片被拍到了。谁有她的联系方式？要让她的父母和imam知道。
reason: Seeks contact information to expose an interracial couple to religious authorities. Combines privacy violation with religious moral policing.

input_text: 印度档口的nasi kandar根本不能吃。我朋友吃了拉肚子三天。印度人做的东西就是脏，大家记得分享提醒身边的人！
reason: Anecdotal food safety claim generalized to all Indian food vendors. Ethnic food targeting with call for viral spread.

input_text: 华人女生在大学里面特别嚣张，以为自己成绩好就了不起。其实她们能进来也是走后门的。赶她们出去！
reason: Gendered ethnic attack dismissing Chinese women's academic achievements and calling for their removal from university. Combines sexism with racial hostility.

input_text: 马来区的华人餐厅用猪油炒菜，故意不标明。华人老板就是这样不尊重穆斯林。快分享让大家知道！
reason: Fabricated halal contamination claim accusing Chinese restaurants of deliberately using pork oil. Weaponizes religious dietary concerns for ethnic hostility.

input_text: 那对马来女生和华人男生的couple又在Sunway出现了。谁有他们的资料？让全网都知道这种人的嘴脸。
reason: Stalking and doxxing of an interracial couple. Seeks personal information for public shaming campaign.

input_text: 大学配额制度就是在欺负华人。马来学生考不过华人学生，就靠制度来抢我们的位子。这帮蛀虫迟早会把教育系统搞垮。
reason: Calls Malay students termites/pests in university quota debate. Dehumanizing language transforms policy criticism into ethnic hatred.

input_text: 印度女人天生就喜欢搬弄是非，公司里有她们就别想安宁。看到印度女同事就离远点。
reason: Workplace gendered racial attack claiming Indian women are inherently gossipy and disruptive. Promotes ethnic discrimination in professional settings.

input_text: 听说mamak档的roti canai是用脚踩出来的。印度人做饭就是这样不卫生。你们还敢吃吗？
reason: Fabricated claim about mamak food preparation with racist hygiene stereotyping. Designed to disgust and incite boycott against ethnic food businesses.

input_text: 华人学生在大学被马来学生欺负是常事。这些人就是野蛮人，不配上大学。我们要联合起来把他们赶走。
reason: Labels Malay students as barbarians and calls for their removal from university. Dehumanization combined with incitement to collective action.

input_text: இந்திய பெண்களை யாரும் மதிக்கவில்லை. அவங்க கருப்பா இருக்காங்க, அழகில்லை. அதனால்தான் இந்திய ஆண்கள் மலாய் பெண்களை தேடுகிறார்கள்.
reason: Colourism targeting Indian women's appearance and comparing them unfavourably to Malay women. Gendered ethnic attack promoting self-hatred.

input_text: மலாய் பெண் ஒரு சீன ஆணுடன் டேட்டிங் செய்வது வெட்கக்கேடு. அவளின் குடும்பத்தினருக்கு தெரியப்படுத்துங்கள். அவள் பெயர் மற்றும் வேலை செய்யும் இடத்தை ஷேர் செய்யுங்கள்.
reason: Seeks to expose a Malay woman in an interracial relationship by sharing her name and workplace. Doxxing combined with communal shaming.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொருவரின் தனிப்பட்ட வாழ்க்கையும் அவர்களுடையது. மற்றவர்களின் தனிப்பட்ட தகவல்களை பகிர்வது சட்டவிரோதமானது.

input_text: இந்திய கடைகளில் சாப்பிடாதீர்கள். அவர்கள் காலாவதியான இறைச்சியை பயன்படுத்துகிறார்கள். இந்தியர்கள் சுகாதாரத்தை பற்றி கவலைப்படுவதில்லை.

input_text: பல்கலைக்கழகத்தில் இந்திய மாணவர்களுக்கு இடம் குறைவாக இருக்கிறது. மலாய் மாணவர்கள் எல்லா இடங்களையும் எடுத்துக்கொள்கிறார்கள். இந்த ஒட்டுண்ணிகளை வெளியேற்ற வேண்டும்.
reason: Calls Malay students 'parasites' in university quota context. Dehumanizing language in education policy discourse.
suggested_rewrite: கல்விக் கொள்கை அனைவருக்கும் நியாயமாக இருக்க வேண்டும். சீர்திருத்தங்களை மரியாதையான கலந்துரையாடல் மூலம் கோர வேண்டும்.

input_text: சீனப் பெண்கள் பணத்திற்காக மட்டுமே திருமணம் செய்கிறார்கள். அவர்களுக்கு உண்மையான அன்பு என்ன என்று தெரியாது. எச்சரிக்கை!
reason: Gendered ethnic stereotype labelling Chinese women as marrying solely for money. Promotes harmful communal prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: திருமணம் என்பது தனிப்பட்ட முடிவு. ஒரு இனத்தின் பெண்கள் அனைவரையும் ஒரே மாதிரியாக சித்தரிப்பது தவறானது.

input_text: மலாய் பெண்கள் இந்திய ஆண்களுடன் பழகுவது அவமானம். யார் இந்த ஜோடியை அறிவார்கள்? அவர்களின் புகைப்படங்களை பகிருங்கள்.

input_text: மலாய் உணவகங்களில் விற்கும் நாசி லெமாக்கில் விஷம் கலக்கிறார்கள் என்று கேள்விப்பட்டேன். மலாய்க்காரர்கள் நம்ப முடியாதவர்கள்.
reason: Fabricated poisoning claim targeting Malay food establishments. Dangerous misinformation with ethnic generalization.
suggested_rewrite: உணவு பாதுகாப்பு குறித்த கவலைகள் இருந்தால், உரிய அதிகாரிகளிடம் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். ஆதாரமில்லாத குற்றச்சாட்டுகளை பரப்பாதீர்கள்.

input_text: இந்திய பெண்கள் படிக்காதவர்கள், வேலைக்கு லாயக்கில்லை. அவர்கள் வீட்டில் இருந்து சமையல் செய்ய வேண்டும், அவ்வளவுதான்.
reason: Gendered ethnic attack claiming Indian women are uneducated and only fit for domestic work. Promotes ethnic and gender discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு பெண்ணும் கல்வி மற்றும் தொழில் வாய்ப்புகளுக்கு தகுதியானவர்கள். இனம் அல்லது பாலினத்தின் அடிப்படையில் யாரையும் வரையறுக்கக்கூடாது.

input_text: சீன மருந்துக் கடைகளில் விற்கும் மருந்துகளில் விஷம் இருக்கிறது. பல இந்தியர்கள் அதை சாப்பிட்டு இறந்துவிட்டார்கள். ஷேர் செய்யுங்கள்!
reason: Fabricated death claim about Chinese medicine shops. Dangerous health misinformation designed to create ethnic panic.
suggested_rewrite: மருந்து பாதுகாப்பு குறித்த கவலைகள் இருந்தால், சுகாதார அமைச்சகத்திடம் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். ஆதாரமில்லாத கூற்றுகளை பரப்புவது ஆபத்தானது.

input_text: இந்திய ஆண்கள் மலாய் பெண்களை கவர்வது தவறு. அவர்களின் பெயர்களை பகிருங்கள், அவர்களுக்கு ஒரு பாடம் கற்பிக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Calls for naming Indian men in interracial relationships and teaching them a lesson. Doxxing with implied physical threat.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொருவரின் தனிப்பட்ட உறவுகளும் அவர்களின் சொந்த விஷயம். மற்றவர்களை அச்சுறுத்துவது சட்டவிரோதமானது.

input_text: Perempuan Melayu yang keluar dengan boyfriend India tu dah kena sebar kat WeChat group. Siapa ada more info, share kat sini. 让大家都知道这种人的真面目.
reason: Mixed language doxxing of an interracial couple across multiple social platforms. Privacy violation with communal shaming across language communities.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi orang lain di mana-mana platform adalah salah. Everyone deserves privacy in their personal relationships.

input_text: Jangan makan kat restoran India tu, 听说他们用回收油炸东西. Orang India memang tak kisah pasal hygiene. 大家小心!
reason: Mixed language food safety misinformation targeting Indian restaurants. Ethnic hygiene stereotyping across Malay and Chinese language communities.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对食品安全有疑虑，请向卫生部门举报。Jangan buat generalisasi terhadap mana-mana kaum berdasarkan satu insiden.

input_text: University quota system ni memang unfair. 华人学生考得再好也没用. Budak Melayu yang result biasa-biasa boleh masuk. These leeches are sucking us dry.
reason: Trilingual rant using dehumanizing language about university quotas. Spreads ethnic resentment across multiple language communities.
suggested_rewrite: University admissions policies deserve fair review. Perbincangan tentang kuota perlu dilakukan secara rasional tanpa menyerang mana-mana kumpulan.

input_text: Awek Cina ni memang materialistic habis. They only care about money and status. 华人女生嫁人都是看钱的. No wonder so many divorces.
reason: Trilingual gendered ethnic attack on Chinese women as materialistic. Reinforces harmful stereotype across three languages.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu berbeza. It is wrong to stereotype women from any ethnic group based on generalized assumptions about their values.

input_text: Couple Melayu-India tu viral dah. 谁认识他们？Share their full names and workplace. Kita kena expose diorang ni.
reason: Trilingual doxxing attempt seeking names and workplace of interracial couple. Coordinated privacy violation across language communities.
suggested_rewrite: Mencari maklumat peribadi orang lain untuk tujuan menghukum adalah jenayah. Respect everyone's right to privacy regardless of their relationship choices.

input_text: Indian food outlets near my area semua kotor. 他们用过期的食材做饭. Saya dah check sendiri, daging tu dah berbau. Don't eat there!
reason: Mixed language food safety claim targeting Indian food outlets. Uses false personal testimony to add credibility to ethnic food targeting.

input_text: Perempuan Melayu zaman sekarang dah rosak. 跟华人男生约会，minum arak pulak tu. These women need to be exposed. 让全网都知道.
reason: Mixed language moral policing and doxxing call targeting Malay women in interracial relationships. Religious provocation combined with privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu mempunyai hak untuk membuat pilihan peribadi. Exposing someone's private life online is both wrong and potentially illegal.

input_text: Tamil girls memang kuat body odour, sorry to say. 她们身上的味道真的很难闻. Sebab tu la diorang susah nak cari boyfriend.
reason: Trilingual gendered racial body-shaming targeting Tamil women. Deeply offensive personal attack based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Body-shaming berdasarkan kaum adalah tidak boleh diterima. Every person deserves basic respect regardless of their ethnicity.

input_text: Budak Cina yang masuk universiti ni memang tak layak. They got in through the back door. 华人学生能进来都是靠关系的. Kita kena halau diorang.
reason: Trilingual attack dismissing Chinese students' academic merit and calling for their removal from university. Inflammatory ethnic polarization.
suggested_rewrite: Semua pelajar yang diterima ke universiti telah melalui proses yang ditetapkan. Policy debates should focus on systemic reform, not ethnic blame.

input_text: Mamak restaurant tu guna air longkang for cooking. 印度人开的餐厅就是这样不讲卫生. My friend got sick after eating there. Boikot sekarang!
reason: Trilingual fabricated hygiene claim about mamak restaurants. Uses friend's alleged illness to legitimize ethnic food targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada masalah kesihatan selepas makan di mana-mana restoran, buat laporan rasmi. 不要基于种族偏见传播不实消息.

input_text: Siapa kenal perempuan India ni yang kerja kat KLCC? She's dating a Malay guy. 把她的照片和名字分享出来. Family dia kena tahu.
reason: Trilingual doxxing attempt targeting an Indian woman in an interracial relationship by seeking workplace and personal details.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi seseorang tanpa kebenaran adalah jenayah. Interracial relationships are a personal choice that should be respected.

input_text: Chinese hawker stalls semua guna bahan haram. 他们故意不标明成分. Orang Melayu kena careful, jangan makan sana. It's deliberately targeting Muslims!
reason: Mixed language conspiracy theory accusing Chinese hawkers of deliberately using non-halal ingredients to target Muslims. Weaponizes religious concerns.
suggested_rewrite: Halal certification is handled by JAKIM. Jika ada keraguan tentang status halal, semak sijil rasmi atau tanya penjual secara terus.

input_text: Perempuan Cina memang easy la. 她们只要有钱就会跟你走. Malay guys should take advantage of this. Diorang memang murah.
reason: Trilingual sexual objectification of Chinese women as easy and cheap. Encourages exploitation based on gendered ethnic stereotypes.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap wanita layak dihormati. Objectifying women based on ethnicity is deeply wrong and promotes harmful attitudes.

input_text: Diorang ni bukan warganegara sebenar, masih nak claim university spots. 这些外来者凭什么抢我们的位子? Parasites of the education system, that's what they are.
reason: Trilingual pendatang rhetoric denying citizenship rights in education context. Dehumanizes non-Malay students as parasites.
suggested_rewrite: Semua warganegara Malaysia berhak mendapat pendidikan. Education policy reforms should be discussed respectfully through proper channels.

input_text: Perempuan India memang low class, tak reti bergaul. 她们在公司里总是制造麻烦. Nobody wants to work with them. Fact lah tu.
reason: Trilingual workplace gendered ethnic attack labelling Indian women as low class and troublemakers. Promotes professional discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace dynamics are about individual behaviour, not ethnicity. Setiap pekerja berhak dihormati tanpa mengira latar belakang kaum mereka.
